reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the 2007 Irish romantic musical film that the musical is based on.
2. Determine the year that the musical based on that film premiered and return the year.
original_final_question: What year did the musical premiere that was based on the 2007 Irish romantic musical film of the same name? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which 2007 Irish romantic musical film by John Carney is the musical based on? Evidence: Once (film): Once is a 2007 Irish romantic musical film written and directed by John Carney. -> Once

Node 2: What year did the musical based on that film premiere? Evidence: Once (musical): Once is a musical based on the 2007 film of the same name by John Carney. The musical premiered at the New York Theatre Workshop in 2011, before transferring to Broadway in 2012. -> 2011
